title: Why GWEI Went Up Yesterday
summary: ETHGas was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 27.5% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 27.5% move.

The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
